strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple secondary languages (Java, Kotlin, D)
Direct AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP, agentic workflows) and cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Strong focus on testable, maintainable code with contributions to open-source projects and testing frameworks
concerns: Recent career gap (Oct 2025–Present) without clear explanation
Limited visible experience with Nest.js and Vitest (primary stack requirements)
Primary resume focuses more on Dlang and Ember.js than modern JS/TS frameworks

key_factors.factor: Career gap and missing primary stack skills

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with deep TypeScript/Node.js experience and recent AI-agent work, aligning well with backend and full-stack requirements. However, the career gap and limited exposure to Nest.js/Vitest raise concerns about immediate role fit. His diverse language background and open-source contributions suggest adaptability, but gaps in primary stack experience require validation.
